_descriptor_type: A type of descriptor. One of 'simulation', 'trace', and 'perf'.
_architecture: A name of the available architectures (PARAMS.<architecture>) found in scarab repository, which defines the machine parameters of the default configuration.
_experiment: Branch-delay-load attribution record pass over SPEC CPU2006 (rate_int + rate_fp). Enabling --branch_load_dep_attribute_record makes each workload/simpoint write its per-simpoint attribution CSVs into --branch_load_dep_trace_dir: the aggregated <bench>_<simpt>_braddr.csv (line,cycles) and branch_delay_loads.csv / _nfpool.csv, PLUS the new per-dynamic-instance <bench>_<simpt>_pf.csv (seqnum,line) emitted by br_exec_wait.cc for the seqnum-driven prefetcher. Writes to the same bld_traces_kmhv3 directory the replay experiments read, and uses the same top_simpoint setting as dcache_marked_hit_vs_perfect_spec06 so the recorded simpoints line up. REQUIRES scarab_path to be built from the bld-prefetch-seqnum-csv branch (which adds the pf.csv emit).
_workload_manager: manual: run each exp scenario with all the simpoints at a time, slurm: Slurm schedules simulations based on its policy
_root_dir: Root directory mounted into the docker container home, for instance, the user's home directory
_application_dir: The path to the benchmark application directory used for tracing or simulation.
_scarab_path: The path to the scarab repository that contains the scarab binary used to run the experiment. Must be built from the bld-prefetch-seqnum-csv branch so the pf.csv emit is present.
_traces_dir: The local directory containing all simpointed traces
_top_simpoint: Run only top 3 simpoints stored in 'workloads_top_simp.json'. Must match the replay experiment (dcache_marked_hit_vs_perfect_spec06) so the recorded per-simpoint CSVs cover the simpoints the replay run reads back.
_simulations: Attribution-record pass over SPEC CPU2006 integer + floating-point rate suites. Each workload/simpoint writes its own <bench>_<simpt>_{braddr,pf}.csv into --branch_load_dep_trace_dir; both suites populate the same directory.
_configurations: Single config that enables the branch-delay-load attribution recorder. Output goes to --branch_load_dep_trace_dir; the derived filename is <bench>_<simpt>_<suffix>, so int and fp workloads coexist in the same directory. This pass produces the <bench>_<simpt>_pf.csv (seqnum,line) files the seqnum-driven prefetch replay will consume, alongside the existing braddr.csv.

record._params: Attribution record pass -> bld_traces_kmhv3 (also emits per-instance pf.csv).

_mem: Memory scheduling and collection settings for Slurm jobs.
